ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the batch */,
  "batch_date" TEXT /* Date on which the batch was processed */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stations table */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line where the batch was processed */,
  "preference" INTEGER /* Preference level of the batch, indicating its priority */,
  "cycle_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the cycle for the batch in minutes */,
  "station_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the station where the batch is processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for each station */,
  "station_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_status" (
  "batch_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch status */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the production_batches table */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the batch */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date on which the batch status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for each role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
